summary: M424 — Extreme-class rebalance pass. Rogue NERFED: Backstab L10 2.50→2.10 + condition bonus 1.2→0.7, Shadow Step L18 2.53→1.9, Death Mark L20 dmgAmp 1.2→0.7. Monk BUFFED: Palm Strike 1.3→1.6, Flurry 0.6→0.8 (×3=2.4), Shadow Step 2.0→2.4. Paladin BUFFED: Holy Strike 1.1→1.5/2.0/2.6, Consecration 0.6→1.0/1.4/1.8. Shadow Dancer Shadow Strike 1.5→1.9 + Assassinate 2.2→2.6. Witch Hunter Silver Bolt 1.6→1.8 + Purge Strike 2.0→2.3. Shaman Spirit Bolt 1.5→1.0 (was hugely overperforming). Demon Hunter Demon Bolt 0.88→1.4 base. Todo List added to docs nav menu.
